title: Install App Now
description: Install an application using SAK package manager first, then verify.
starter_prompt: Install the requested application. Use SAK package manager before raw shell commands.

phases.prompt: Search the built-in SAK package manager for candidate packages before install or web fallback.
phases.completion: Built-in package candidates are captured or ambiguity is reported.

phases.prompt: Check whether selected package is already installed.
SAK package lookup failed before installation. Find official vendor installer sources, silent install guidance, checksum/signature guidance, and risks. Do not install from the web automatically.
phases.completion: Official fallback install source and next safe action are identified or unavailable.

phases.prompt: Install selected package after approval/restore-point gate if needed.
phases.completion: Installer exits and output is captured.

phases.prompt: Create a technician-readable install report with evidence, package/source selection, actions/tools used, install result, verification status, logs/artifacts, cleanup status, residual risk, and follow-up.
Preserve install logs and report artifacts; remove only temporary scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: SAK package manager was tried before raw choco/winget.
Install was approved according to access mode.
Installed version or failure reason is reported.
